source: Binding of Isaac: Repentance - Special Seeds (community-documented)

seeds.name: Black Candle
seeds.effect: Every curse (Darkness, Lost, Maze, Blind, Unknown, Cursed) is active on every floor.

seeds.name: Brown Snake
seeds.effect: Exploding poops have a 50% chance to turn into a snake.

seeds.name: Crap Pipe
seeds.effect: Every poop sprays out random tears.

seeds.name: Draw Noir
seeds.effect: The whole game is rendered in black and white.

seeds.name: Hardcore
seeds.effect: Hard mode rules are forced on (half HP, fewer pickups).

seeds.name: It's a Trap
seeds.effect: Every chest behaves like a mimic and attacks you when opened.

seeds.name: Olde Worlde
seeds.effect: Sprites and colours revert to the old (Flash) Isaac look.

seeds.name: Pay 2 Win
seeds.effect: All pickups (hearts, keys, bombs) must be bought with coins, like in a shop.

seeds.name: Pure Evil
seeds.effect: All Angel Rooms are replaced with Devil Rooms.

seeds.name: Slow Mode
seeds.effect: The game runs in slow motion.

seeds.name: Superhot
seeds.effect: Time only moves when you move (Superhot mechanic).

seeds.name: Fart Sounds
seeds.effect: All sound effects are replaced with fart noises.

seeds.name: Purgatory
seeds.effect: Every room is extra hard, like the Mom's Heart fight.

seeds.name: Glowing Enemies
seeds.effect: Enemies glow, as if they were champions.

seeds.name: Ultra Hard
seeds.effect: Hard mode plus every curse and the hardest item pool.
